rule: classify each file as primitive_complete (pure math/no further logic appropriate) or stub (claims X but only frame+placeholder)

files.verdict: Pure Landauer kT*ln(2) calculator. LN2_X1000=693, three pure fns (ln2_x1000, kT_x1000, bits_erased, l_dissipated_x1000). Integer fixed-point hash-stable. No logic missing.
Lambda = phi_EMA / phi_peak with alpha=0.3 EMA. Full ResilienceState struct + new/update/lambda fns. Inline self-test asserts lambda > 0.5 on climb-crash-recover trajectory.
T = (1/2)(dW/dt)^2 kinetic term. delta_w + t_tension_x1000 + kinetic_trajectory all implemented in integer per-mille^2/2 fixed-point. Convention T_1=0.

Helper module by design. Docstring explicitly states ksg_estimator must be inlined at driver level (hexa stage0 module loader unstable). Provides rotate_rows (deterministic null-baseline cyclic shift) and concat_rows (joint-sample builder) as the primitive operators. The MI computation itself is delegated to driver/inlined ksg_mi — this is documented architecture, not a stub.
Compression ratio C = d_full / participation_ratio(X). PR = (sum sigma^2)^2 / sum(sigma^4). col_mean + col_variance + participation_ratio + compression_ratio all implemented with [1, d_full] clamp.
Three-observable verdict combinator (Phi_GWS, Phi_meta, Lambda_resil) with thresholds 0.50/0.85/0.60 -> L0/L1/L2/L3. Inline self-test verifies strong->L3_FULL and weak->L0_NONE.
Phi_meta = mean cosine(prev, curr) gated at 0.85. Full pm_mean_cos + compute_phi_meta + phi_meta_soft. Inline self-test asserts near-identical >= unrelated.
Landauer-channel efficiency = (useful_progress * log2(Omega_micro)) / L_dissipated, clamped [0,1] per-mille. log2_omega_x1000 lookup table for size in [2..8] + integer fallback. Full implementation.
Unified pure-snapshot observer: CellSnapshot struct + co_tau_average (mean L2) + co_topology_sig (FNV-hash of n,d,sign-pattern) + make_snapshot + snapshot_line. Inline self-test prints PASS.
Shannon H over {active, drop, sealed} + dS/dt = (H_k - H_{k-1})/ticks. log2_inv_per_mille_x1000 uses 23-anchor piecewise-linear lookup table. Full integer fixed-point implementation.

STUB MODE label in docstring is documented design choice — current corpus does not yet measure comp+diss separately, so V uses log-score proxy V = -ln(W/W_max). Both v_structure_stub_x1000 (active) and v_structure_full_x1000 (future) ARE fully implemented with 20-bin ln lookup. This is mathematically complete; the 'stub' label refers to the eventual richer V form, not missing code.

IB_loss = I(X;Z) - beta*I(Z;Y). Provides build_P (LCG-quasi-Gaussian projection matrix, 1/sqrt(d) scaled), project_Z (matmul X*P^T), ib_loss formula. ksg_mi for I(X;Z) and I(Z;Y) is inlined in driver — same architecture as predictive_mi.

design_observations.library_vs_driver_split: All four 'library_only' modules without self-tests are pure-fn libraries meant for import (hexa stage0 has unstable module loader, so inlining is the production pattern). The four files with inline self-tests have top-level let bindings that print PASS/FAIL at load time.
design_observations.integer_fixed_point: All dissipation + lagrangian primitives use ×1000 per-mille fixed-point for hash-stable cert output (matches tool/edu_cell_4gen_crystallize.hexa convention).
design_observations.stub_label_in_v_structure: v_structure.hexa header self-labels 'STUB until comp+diss ship' but the implementation is mathematically complete — 'stub' here means 'placeholder for a richer formula', not missing code. Replacement is gated on upstream measurement availability, not on this file.

decision: ALL 12 PRIMITIVES COMPLETE. NO IMPLEMENTATION CHANGES MADE. READ-ONLY AUDIT.
